backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for G&S MEDICAL with CRUD operations for medicines, sellers, site content, and chat messages, plus a simple admin login using hardcoded credentials.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (public homepage and admin dashboard) to their associated source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, covering admin pages, seller detail page, admin manager components, and the main App router setup.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'G&S MEDICAL' and mounting the app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app entry point that configures TanStack Router with routes for the homepage, seller detail, admin login, and protected admin dashboard, wrapping public routes with a ChatWidget layout.
frontend/src/components/admin/MedicineMa: Admin CRUD interface for medicines, featuring a table of medicine rows (each fetching its own data), and dialogs for adding, editing, and deleting medicines.
frontend/src/components/admin/SellerMana: Admin CRUD interface for sellers with a table supporting inline status changes via a dropdown, plus dialogs for adding, editing, and deleting seller records.
frontend/src/components/admin/WebsiteCon: Admin editor that renders individual save-able fields for configurable site content keys (hero headline, about text, announcements, etc.) with character-count validation.
Reusable wrapper component that uses IntersectionObserver to trigger CSS entrance animations (fade-up, fade-in, slide-left, slide-right) with configurable delay and threshold, respecting prefers-reduced-motion.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: Floating chat widget component that renders a toggleable chat window with bot/user message bubbles, typing indicator, quick-question shortcuts, and responses generated via a local chatbot utility.
frontend/src/components/MedicineCard.tsx: Presentational card component for displaying a single medicine's image, name, category, description, price, stock, and availability badge with hover animations.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive fixed navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll section links, a top contact bar, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Wrapper component that redirects unauthenticated users to the /admin login page, rendering children only when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/SellerCard.tsx: Clickable card component displaying a seller's name, status badge, phone, address, and license number, navigating to the seller detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/SellersSection.t: Landing page section that fetches and displays active seller cards in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons and an empty-state fallback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Provides simple localStorage-based admin authentication with hardcoded credentials, exposing login, logout, and isAuthenticated state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity state, login/clear functions, and status flags to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on Sellers, Medicines, and SiteContent by calling the backend actor, with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a G&S Medical emerald-green and gold theme via CSS custom properties along with utility classes and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with a sidebar navigation for managing medicines, sellers, and website content, plus an overview with stat cards and logout functionality.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page with an email/password form that authenticates via useAuth and redirects to the dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main public-facing homepage for G&S MEDICAL, composed of multiple sections (Hero, About, Founders, Medicines, Sellers, Contact, Footer) with animations, stats, and WhatsApp/phone CTAs.
frontend/src/pages/SellerDetailPage.tsx: Detail page for an individual seller, fetched by ID from the route params, showing profile info, status badge, contact links, and a ChatWidget; handles loading and not-found states.
frontend/src/utils/chatbot.ts: Rule-based chatbot utility that matches user input against FAQ keyword patterns and returns predefined responses covering ordering, medicines, contact info, delivery, and seller registration for G&S MEDICAL.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Outfit, Playfair Display), an emerald/gold medical color palette using OKLCH values, custom shadows, border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest documenting the G&S MEDICAL website's version, architectural notes (admin credentials, contact info), known issues, image requirements, and a list of implemented features including homepage, admin dashboard, and seller management.
